title: Post-query Enum restructure for deep nested preloads
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.category_tree/0` that returns categories with nested posts, each post with nested comments, each comment with author. Use deeply nested struct preloads: `preload: [posts: [comments: [:author]]]`. Avoid N+1 at every level — one query per association tier (4 queries total). Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Deep nested struct preload syntax; easy to get the list/keyword structure wrong at 3+ levels.
